channel.title: CuriousLab — Making Science Click
channel.description: Bite-sized, deep-dive discussions on O-Level Physics and beyond. Each episode breaks down a topic from the CuriousLab classroom into an engaging, easy-to-follow conversation. Perfect for students who want to truly understand — not just memorise.
channel.itunes:author: CuriousLab
channel.itunes:summary: Bite-sized, deep-dive discussions on O-Level Physics and beyond. Each episode breaks down a topic from the CuriousLab classroom into an engaging, easy-to-follow conversation. Perfect for students who want to truly understand — not just memorise.

item.title: Turning Effect of Forces
item.description: A deep-dive discussion on Turning Effect of Forces. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.
item.itunes:summary: A deep-dive discussion on Turning Effect of Forces. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.

item.title: What Parents Should Look For in Tuition
item.description: A deep-dive discussion on What Parents Should Look For in Tuition. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.
item.itunes:summary: A deep-dive discussion on What Parents Should Look For in Tuition. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.

item.title: Dynamics
item.description: A deep-dive discussion on Dynamics. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.
item.itunes:summary: A deep-dive discussion on Dynamics. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.

item.title: Kinematics
item.description: A deep-dive discussion on Kinematics. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.
item.itunes:summary: A deep-dive discussion on Kinematics. Part of the CuriousLab — Making Science Click podcast series.

item.title: Why Studying Hard ≠ Studying Smart
item.description: The science behind effective learning: why effort alone isn't enough, and how to study smarter using evidence-based techniques like spaced repetition and active recall.
item.itunes:summary: The science behind effective learning: why effort alone isn't enough, and how to study smarter using evidence-based techniques like spaced repetition and active recall.

item.title: Measurement — Precision, Accuracy & SI Units
item.description: Everything about measurement in physics: SI units, prefixes, significant figures, precision vs accuracy, and common instruments. A must-know for exam success.
item.itunes:summary: Everything about measurement in physics: SI units, prefixes, significant figures, precision vs accuracy, and common instruments. A must-know for exam success.

item.title: Turning Effect of Forces — Moments & Equilibrium
item.description: Understanding moments, torque, the principle of moments, and conditions for equilibrium. Essential concepts for O-Level Physics.
item.itunes:summary: Understanding moments, torque, the principle of moments, and conditions for equilibrium. Essential concepts for O-Level Physics.

item.title: Dynamics — Forces and Newton's Laws
item.description: Exploring the world of forces, Newton's three laws of motion, and how they govern everything from falling apples to rocket launches.
item.itunes:summary: Exploring the world of forces, Newton's three laws of motion, and how they govern everything from falling apples to rocket launches.

item.title: Kinematics — Motion, Speed & Velocity
item.description: A deep dive into kinematics: understanding motion, speed, velocity, and acceleration. Perfect for O-Level Physics students tackling this foundational topic.
item.itunes:summary: A deep dive into kinematics: understanding motion, speed, velocity, and acceleration. Perfect for O-Level Physics students tackling this foundational topic.
